title: Ignore local environment secret file
description: Add .env to gitignore before storing the Roboflow API key locally, then write the secret only to the ignored local file without committing it.
close_reason: Added .env to gitignore and wrote local ROBOFLOW_API_KEY to ignored .env with mode 600. Secret file was not read or staged.

title: Acquire Roboflow ringworm prediction dataset fallback
description: If Kaivlya is not exportable, acquire https://universe.roboflow.com/majorproject-kopqr/dog-skin-disease-prediction version 3. Build raw/normalized manifests for flea_allergy, hotspot, mange, and ringworm, map ringworm to dermatophytosis as noisy training/proxy data, and run exact SHA/pHash dedup before training use.
notes: 2026-07-07: Kaivlya was inspected and closed as not currently exportable: public page reports Dataset versions 0 and Models 0. Added fallback docs for dog-skin-disease-prediction/3 and ml/prepare_roboflow_prediction.py. Environment currently has ROBOFLOW_API_KEY=missing and no roboflow CLI/SDK installed, so raw download is pending a key configured in the shell. Once available, run the documented uvx roboflow download command, prepare manifest, then dedup before training use.
close_reason: Downloaded dog-skin-disease-prediction/3 into gitignored raw storage using ephemeral Roboflow API key, prepared normalized manifest, ran pHash dedup against primary Roboflow, Mendeley, and silver-v0. Kept 74 train/val rows after dedup, including 9 ringworm->dermatophytosis candidates; documented acquisition and fixed dedup reference handling.

title: Inspect and acquire Roboflow Kaivlya dogs skin disease dataset
description: Check whether https://universe.roboflow.com/kaivlya/dogs-skin-disease-fxh4x has an exportable/versioned dataset. If accessible, download into gitignored raw storage, build a provenance manifest, map labels as noisy training/proxy candidates, and run exact SHA/pHash dedup against existing Roboflow, Mendeley, silver, and future gold manifests.
close_reason: Inspected public Roboflow page and current environment. Kaivlya has 2,953 images and useful taxonomy, but public page reports Dataset versions 0 and Models 0, so there is no stable Universe version to export/download. Environment also lacks roboflow CLI/SDK and ROBOFLOW_API_KEY. Falling back to versioned dog-skin-disease-prediction/3 via petcare-triage-service-ghn.

title: Generate silver proxy intake from held-out Roboflow split
description: Add tooling to sample the Roboflow test split excluded from CV training into a silver-v0 proxy intake CSV, then build/audit a local gitignored silver dataset rehearsal without marking it as gold or vet-confirmed.
close_reason: Added generator for silver intake from held-out Roboflow test split, generated local gitignored silver-v0 rehearsal artifacts, audited coverage, ran exact/pHash leakage checks, and documented the run. pHash leakage confirms this is process rehearsal only, not independent eval.

title: Add silver proxy evaluation dataset flow
description: Create a separate silver/proxy evaluation dataset path for simulated or non-vet-confirmed adjudication so ML pipeline validation can continue without marking rows as gold or vet-confirmed. Include schema/tooling/docs/tests and keep gold-v0 reserved for real vet-confirmed evidence.
close_reason: Implemented separate silver/proxy eval flow with schema, builder, auditor, intake/template docs, manifest example, and tests. Gold-v0 remains reserved for real vet-confirmed evidence.

title: Collect and adjudicate gold-v0 evaluation images
description: Acquire the first frozen gold-v0 image set using the executable manifest schema. Target at least 20 vet-confirmed images per in-scope condition plus healthy_skin, non-skin pet, human/other-species OOD, and poor-quality examples. Every row must have matching SHA-256, vetConfirmed=true, neverTrain=true, consent/license provenance, and adjudication metadata. Publish as a private HF dataset after dedup checks against training data.
notes: 2026-07-07: Gold-v0 tooling remains ready but real vet-confirmed evidence is pending. Added separate silver/proxy path and generated a local silver-v0 rehearsal from held-out Roboflow test split under gitignored ml/silver/. Rehearsal selected 80 rows (20 each: atopic_dermatitis, bacterial_pyoderma, fungal_malassezia, healthy_skin), exact SHA leakage was clean, pHash threshold 4 found 51 matches across 15 rows, so this proxy is useful for pipeline rehearsal only, not independent accuracy claims.

title: Investigate AI-Hub Korean pet skin dataset access
description: Determine whether the AI-Hub Korean companion animal skin disease dataset can be accessed for PetCare training. Record registration requirements, license/usage restrictions, data format, classes, dog/cat split, annotations, and whether it can be mirrored or only referenced. Do not download or publish until terms are clear.
close_reason: Investigated official AI-Hub 561 pet skin dataset access, terms, format, counts, API inventory, and mirror risks. Dataset is high-value but not acquired because approval, Korean-national application, foreign-use/export, and redistribution constraints must be resolved first. Documented in docs/ml/data/aihub-561-pet-skin.md.

title: Acquire and normalize Mendeley dog skin disease dataset
description: Download and inspect the Hwang/Yoon Mendeley Data dog dermatology dataset identified during scouting. Verify license, RGB suitability, class counts, consent/provenance notes, and map labels to the PetCare canonical taxonomy. Output a manifest and normalized local/HF-ready layout without mixing into the frozen gold eval set.
close_reason: Acquired Mendeley 5dbht54kw7 v1 locally, verified 99 JPEGs with 0 hash mismatches, created normalized manifest/layout preserving unlabeled sources, and documented provenance/license/label gaps. Follow-up petcare-triage-service-105 tracks the missing 33 folder labels.

title: Curate independent pet dermatology training data
description: Build a licensed, provenance-tracked training data expansion path that prioritizes genuinely independent sources over duplicated Kaggle/Roboflow mirrors. Scope includes Mendeley, AI-Hub access research, HF/Roboflow candidates only after license and perceptual-dedup checks, and a versioned HF dataset manifest.
notes: 2026-07-07: Fallback Roboflow dog-skin-disease-prediction/3 acquired and deduped locally. Raw export has 361 images. After pHash4 dedup against primary Roboflow, Mendeley, and silver-v0, kept 74 train/val rows: 9 ringworm->dermatophytosis, 11 train hotspot, 30 train mange, 18 val hotspot, 6 val mange. No flea_allergy/allergic_contact proxy rows survived dedup. This is a tiny noisy training/OOD supplement only.

title: Publish Roboflow cv5 model artifacts privately
description: Preserve the cv5 YOLOv8n bootstrap artifacts from ml/runs/petcare-derm-yolov8-cls in a private artifact repository, preferably Hugging Face. Include best.pt/last.pt per fold, results.csv, summary JSON, training log, dataset provenance, and clear warnings that Roboflow-CV metrics are not product performance.
notes: Published private Hugging Face model repo rosewt/petcare-derm-yolov8n-cv5-roboflow-bootstrap. HF commit 42849f078ca3178eff1a56f38b9b62185ecb7e15. Repo is private and contains README/model card, cv5 summary JSON, full training log, results.csv per fold, confusion/result plots, and best.pt/last.pt per fold. Removed train/val batch preview images from HF after initial upload; verified siblings no longer include dataset-derived batch previews.
close_reason: Published private HF model repo rosewt/petcare-derm-yolov8n-cv5-roboflow-bootstrap with checkpoints, metrics, summary, logs, and model card. Removed dataset-derived batch previews and documented repo/commit in provenance.

title: Train bootstrap classifier on deduped Roboflow split
description: Train an initial PetCare-owned vision classifier using ml/prepared/roboflow_dog_skin_disease_dataset_v2_dedup_phash4 as noisy bootstrap data. Keep healthy as healthy_skin/negative, do not report Roboflow validation as product performance, save model provenance under ml/runs or an approved artifact repo, and evaluate only against an independent gold set when available.
notes: Completed full 5-fold YOLOv8n-cls bootstrap training on Lightning AI Tesla T4. Data: deduped Roboflow cv5, 4,198 rows, group-aware folds. Command used 50 epochs, imgsz 224, batch 32, CUDA device 0. Best top1 by fold: f0=0.93214, f1=0.97262, f2=0.96310, f3=0.91061, f4=0.92729; mean=0.941152, stdev=0.025875. Artifacts copied locally under ml/runs/petcare-derm-yolov8-cls and documented in docs/ml/runs/roboflow-cv5-yolov8n-20260707.md. These are Roboflow-CV metrics only, not product performance.
close_reason: Completed 5-fold YOLOv8n-cls bootstrap training on deduped Roboflow cv5 using Lightning AI Tesla T4. Artifacts copied to local gitignored ml/runs path and run provenance documented. Independent gold evaluation and private artifact publishing remain separate follow-ups.

title: Build dedup-filtered Roboflow bootstrap training split
description: Use the acquired Roboflow v2 manifest plus Mendeley and future gold manifests to exclude exact and perceptual near-duplicates before training. Preserve removed rows in a filter report, keep healthy as healthy_skin, and output a PetCare-owned bootstrap train/val layout.
notes: Built Roboflow bootstrap filter script and generated valid local split at ml/prepared/roboflow_dog_skin_disease_dataset_v2_dedup_phash4. Input 4,398 rows; kept 4,198 train/val rows; removed 200 rows: 180 Roboflow test rows plus 20 Mendeley pHash near-duplicates (17 healthy, 3 hypersensitivity). Exact SHA removals: 0. Report files are manifest.jsonl, removed.jsonl, filter_report.json under the dedup_phash4 output.
close_reason: Generated dedup-filtered Roboflow train/val bootstrap split, preserving removed rows and report metadata. Added reusable filter script, documented output counts, and verified repeatable rerun behavior.

title: Export Roboflow dog derm dataset if smoke test passes
description: If Roboflow Universe smoke testing is plausible, export only the primary taxonomy-aligned project/version metadata and dataset copy for controlled PetCare training. Preserve raw export, version metadata, license page snapshot, class mapping, Unlabeled entries, and perceptual hashes. Run dedup against Mendeley and future gold data before any supervised training use.
notes: Roboflow v2 folder export acquired locally: 4,398 images / 198M, CC BY 4.0 uploader-declared, resized 640x640. Prepared manifest has 4,398 rows. Hosted model comparison on 40 Roboflow test samples: primary classifier 39/40 comparable correct; clinical taxonomy model 15/20 comparable correct; detector 5/40. Exact SHA overlap vs Mendeley is 0, but pHash finds 8 near-duplicate/derivative matches at distance <=4, so Roboflow must be dedup-filtered before training and cannot be used as independent eval.
close_reason: Completed Roboflow v2 export, local preparation, hosted model comparison, Mendeley exact/pHash dedup check, and documentation. Follow-up dedup-filtered training split tracked separately as petcare-triage-service-0hl.

title: Smoke test Roboflow dog derm Universe models
description: Run a no-download Roboflow Inference probe against selected Universe models, starting with dog-skin-disease-dataset/2 and dog-skin-disease-prediction/3. Use a fixed local probe set covering Mendeley labeled images, Mendeley unlabeled_source images, obvious non-skin pet images, and human skin OOD examples. Record model IDs, API requirements, observed label behavior, latency/cost implications, and whether outputs are plausible enough to justify dataset export.
notes: Live Roboflow smoke test completed after base64 payload fix. Dry-run selects 10 Mendeley probes across bacterial_pyoderma, fungal_malassezia, atopic_dermatitis, healthy_skin, and unlabeled_source. Live run produced 30/30 HTTP 200 responses. Hosted model behavior is not reliable enough for PetCare reuse: taxonomy-aligned classifier over-predicts healthy on disease probes; clinical-named classifier over-predicts ringworm/mange; detector over-calls bacterial dermatosis. Results documented in docs/ml/data/roboflow-smoke-test.md.
close_reason: Executed live Roboflow Universe smoke test with 10 Mendeley probes across 3 model IDs. API integration works after base64 payload fix: 30/30 requests returned HTTP 200. Results do not support reusing hosted model behavior; documented model outputs and recommendation in docs/ml/data/roboflow-smoke-test.md.

title: Resolve missing labels in Mendeley dog skin dataset
description: Mendeley dataset 5dbht54kw7 v1 has 95 source folders but image_label.txt labels only 62 folders. Determine whether a complete label table exists in the paper/supplement/API, or route the 33 unlabeled folders through manual/vet adjudication before supervised training use.
close_reason: No complete public per-folder label table found in Mendeley page, Springer paper/supplement, or local metadata; added reproducible audit and adjudication path; 33 unlabeled folders remain excluded from supervised training until reviewed.

title: Define confidence-calibrated abstention policy
description: Turn model confidence into safe triage behavior. Use calibration curves to choose per-class thresholds and emit the contract unknown/low-confidence path when precision is not high enough. Report precision/coverage tradeoffs per class.

title: Implement OOD and image-quality input gate
description: Reject non-dog-skin, unsupported species, blurry, dark, or otherwise low-quality inputs before forcing a disease label. Define thresholds using OOD/quality negatives from the gold set and wire results into the contract quality/OOD fields.

title: Train calibrated classifier and offline eval harness
description: Replace directional baseline-only evaluation with a reproducible offline harness: per-class recall, confusion matrix, calibration/ECE, OOD AUROC, and model card metrics against the frozen gold set. The service must keep the same inference contract.

title: Design and implement consented capture buffer plus HF sync
description: Implement the service-side half of architecture B: after inference and explicit consent, write image plus JSONL metadata to a local buffer and provide a batch sync step to a private Hugging Face dataset. Capture must be best-effort and never block triage. Outcome/correction fields start nullable until a return-flow exists.

title: Build vet-verified frozen gold evaluation set
description: Create the service-owned gold eval workflow: sourcing plan, vet labeling/adjudication, quality/OOD flags, provenance manifest, and HF versioning. Keep it frozen and never train on it. Include phone/in-the-wild style images so validation reflects real app uploads.
notes: Executable gold-eval scaffolding added: docs/ml/schema/gold-manifest.schema.json, docs/ml/data/gold-v0.manifest.example.jsonl, ml/evaluate_gold.py, and schema test. The harness validates vetConfirmed=true, neverTrain=true, image presence, and SHA-256 before inference, then reports condition accuracy separately from healthy/OOD rows. No real gold images have been collected yet, so this bead remains in progress until gold-v0 is acquired/adjudicated/published.

title: Evaluate Roboflow Universe dog dermatosis data with license and dedup
description: Assess Roboflow Universe dog dermatosis candidates only as augmentation after independent-source work. Verify license, export terms, class taxonomy, duplicate/augmentation patterns, and perceptual dedup requirements. Produce a go/no-go note and normalized mapping if usable.
close_reason: Evaluated Roboflow dog dermatology candidates, identified usable pretrained Universe model IDs for smoke testing, documented taxonomy mapping, model-vs-finetune constraints, license/provenance risks, and follow-up path. Follow-ups: petcare-triage-service-1zk for no-download model smoke test and petcare-triage-service-jqj for controlled export if the smoke test passes.

title: Evaluate HF vet-derm derived dataset with dedup guardrails
description: Inspect shrayyyy/vet-derm-dataset or equivalent HF-derived veterinary dermatology data. Treat it as potentially derived from the same Roboflow/Kaggle lineage. Verify license, source lineage, label quality, and run perceptual dedup against existing training and gold-eval candidates before allowing any training use.
